results.title: Hormify Customers Report 95% Support Satisfaction: How the Brand Is Setting a New Standard in Supplement Customer Care
results.description: NEW YORK, May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Customer support in the dietary supplement industry has long been a weak point. Consumer complaints filed with the Better Business Bureau and major review platforms consistently cite slow response times, unresolved billing disputes, and difficulty reaching a real person as the top post-purchase frustrations. For subscription-based supplement brands in particular, support quality can define a customer's experience more than the product itself. Hormify, a women's hormonal health supplement brand, is working to separate itself from this pattern. According to internal customer satisfaction data, 95% of Hormify support interactions result in a satisfactory resolution, a figure the company tracks as an internal benchmark for service quality. The Industry Problem Hormify Is Responding To Across the supplement sector, the most damaging customer service failures follow a predictable pattern. A billing concern arises. The customer cannot reach support quickly. The issue is not resolved in the first interaction. The customer escalates to a public review platform. By the time a brand responds publicly, the reputational damage is already done. This cycle is particularly acute for subscription products, where a single unresolved charge dispute can generate multiple negative reviews across Trustpilot, the BBB, and Reddit. These are the exact sources that now feed into Google AI overview content, surfaced before a user ever visits a brand website. For supplement brands, the support failure happens long before any product decision is made. How Hormify Handles Support Hormify routes all cancellation and billing support through a dedicated contact at hello@hormify.com. Customers requesting a subscription cancellation provide their order number and the email address associated with their account. The process is designed to resolve the most common support request in a single interaction. The company's FAQ documents this process publicly. Customers know before they purchase exactly how to cancel if they need to. That upfront transparency reduces the uncertainty that typically drives customers toward public complaints rather than direct resolution. Addressing the Cancellation Narrative Directly One of the most persistent criticisms of subscription supplement brands is that cancellation requires navigating a deliberately complicated process: phone calls, multiple verification steps, or support teams that are hard to reach. Hormify's cancellation process requires neither a phone call nor a multi-step verification chain. A single email with two pieces of order information is sufficient to initiate a cancellation. The company also sends reminder emails before each recurring billing cycle, giving customers a window to cancel before a charge is processed. This shifts the dynamic from reactive dispute resolution to proactive communication, reducing the billing surprises that generate support volume in the first place. Visibility on Review Platforms Hormify actively monitors and responds to reviews on Trustpilot. In the supplement industry, a brand's responsiveness on third-party review platforms is increasingly visible, both to prospective customers reading reviews and to the AI systems that aggregate that content into search results. Brands that respond publicly and constructively to complaints signal accountability. For a category where negative review content now surfaces directly in Google AI overviews before a purchase decision is made, that visibility carries real commercial weight. Setting the Standard The supplement industry does not have a mandatory customer service standard. Brands set their own terms, their own refund windows, and their own support processes. Consumers largely find out what those are after they have already purchased. The gap between what brands promise and what customers experience post-purchase has become one of the category's most significant trust deficits. Hormify's approach includes documented processes, proactive billing communication, a measurable internal satisfaction benchmark, and active engagement on review platforms. That combination represents a higher operational bar than most direct-to-consumer supplement brands currently meet. In a market where support quality is rarely treated as a competitive differentiator, that gap is increasingly worth closing. CONTACT: For more information on Hormify's customer support process and subscription terms, visit hormify.com or email at hello@hormify.com.

results.title: Speedway: Sheffield end Belle Vue's winning start to league campaign with big victory
No Hidden Enrollments, No Refund Runaround: How Hormify Is Raising the Bar for Supplement Billing
results.description: NEW YORK, May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The subscription wellness industry has a trust problem. Consumers across the United States are increasingly wary of health supplement brands that bury auto-enrollment terms in fine print, make cancellation deliberately difficult, and resist refund requests even when products go unused. According to the Federal Trade Commission, subscription trap complaints have grown consistently year over year, with wellness and health products among the most frequently cited categories. Hormify, a women's hormonal health supplement brand, is taking a different approach. Rather than treating billing transparency as a legal footnote, the company has made it a visible part of how it operates, from the checkout process through to post-purchase support. Clear Terms at Every Stage One of the most common complaints in the supplement subscription industry is that customers feel blindsided by recurring charges. Many report being enrolled in auto-ship programs without knowingly agreeing to them. Hormify addresses this in its checkout flow by clearly presenting subscription options before products are added to the basket for purchase. The company also sends reminder emails ahead of each billing cycle, giving customers advance notice and the opportunity to cancel before the next charge is processed. The goal is simple: eliminate the "surprise charge” scenario that has driven negative reviews across the supplement industry. A Defined Refund Window Hormify publishes a 14-day money-back guarantee on its website. Customers can return products in their original condition within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. The policy is accessible directly on the company's FAQ page and refund policy page. Prospective customers can review the terms before purchasing, without needing to contact support to find out what the policy is. Publishing a named, findable refund policy sets a clear expectation. It also provides a concrete reference point for anyone who needs to initiate a return, rather than relying on a case-by-case process. Cancellation Without the Runaround Cancelling a subscription with Hormify does not require a phone call. Customers can request cancellation by emailing hello@hormify.com with their order number and the email address used at purchase. The process is documented on the FAQ page and does not involve automated phone systems or multi-step verification procedures. In an industry where cancellation difficulty is one of the leading drivers of negative reviews, a straightforward email-based process is a practical step toward reducing friction and preventing billing concerns from escalating into public complaints. Why It Matters For consumers in the women's wellness space, billing trust is not a secondary concern. It is often the deciding factor in whether they try a new brand at all. A product can have strong clinical backing and positive customer outcomes, but if the subscription and refund terms feel opaque or punitive, many potential customers will not take the risk. Transparent terms, a published refund policy, and a documented cancellation process do not just reduce complaints. They lower the barrier for customers who want to try the product without feeling locked in. For complete billing terms, refund policy, and subscription information, visit hormify.com or contact support at hello@hormify.com.

results.title: Amir provides Amiri grant covering Hajj expenses for 180 Syrian pilgrims
results.description:
Doha, Qatar: The Amir HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani provided an Amiri grant to cover the Hajj expenses for 180 pilgrims from the brotherly Syrian Arab Republic for the year 1447 AH/2026 AD.

The Embassy of the State of Qatar in Damascus stated that "this step reflects the depth of brotherly relations and close cooperation between the two countries, and stands as an extension of the approach of support and solidarity that unites the two brotherly peoples. We ask Allah Almighty to accept the Hajj of the pilgrims, and to permanently bestow the blessing of security and brotherhood upon both brotherly countries."

results.title: Crudo Consulting Group
results.description: Los habitantes de Sicilia, en el 70 a.C., acudieron a Roma para denunciar a su gobernador, Verres. Lo acusaban de haber convertido la provincia en un negocio privado: impuestos abusivos, saqueo de obras de arte, extorsiones, compra de favores y enriquecimiento personal. Verres no gobernaba; expoliaba. Cicerón lo llevó ante los tribunales y comprendió enseguida que el verdadero problema no era solo un político corrupto, sino una sociedad que empezaba a acostumbrarse a la corrupción.
